_comment: Configuration-driven Yoga detection rules. Each rule's conditions are AND-combined; on a full match, detailTemplate is interpolated with {Planet_house} / {Planet_sign} facts and emitted verbatim as before. Text preserved exactly from the original hardcoded engine to guarantee backward compatibility.

rules.name: Gaj Kesari Yoga
rules.detailTemplate: Moon and Jupiter are positioned in mutual kendra houses, a placement traditionally associated with Gaj Kesari Yoga.

rules.name: Budhaditya Yoga
rules.detailTemplate: Sun and Mercury share house {Sun_house}, a combination traditionally associated with Budhaditya Yoga.

rules.name: Raj Yoga indication
rules.detailTemplate: Jupiter in house {Jupiter_house} (a trikona house) is traditionally considered a favorable indicator sometimes associated with Raj Yoga-type influence.
